description_long: This object is a pair of sunglasses with a classic, rectangular full-rim frame that appears robust and slightly thick. The frame is solid and opaque, with a matte finish, and the lenses are darkly tinted, providing significant coverage for the eyes. The temples are straight and of medium thickness, with no visible embellishments or patterns, and they connect seamlessly to the front frame. The bridge is wide and flat, integrated smoothly into the frame without any visible nose pads or additional support structures. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for everyday urban use. No brand logo or insignia is visible on any part of the glasses.
description: A pair of rectangular, full-rim sunglasses with dark tinted lenses and a solid, matte frame. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible branding or embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular frame and dark lenses, with a wide, flat bridge and no visible nose pads.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the frame and temples, with a straight, unadorned design.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, highlighting the full-rim structure and consistent lens tint.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, identical to the other side, showing the straight, plain temples.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular full-rim frame with a slightly thick, robust structure and straight temples. The design is minimalist, with no visible embellishments or decorative features.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses are dark brown with a uniform tint, providing high opacity and no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Wide, flat bridge integrated into the frame, with no visible nose pads or additional support structures.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, of medium thickness, and unadorned, with no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative elements.
